reviewer.description: Read-only code reviewer. Use after implementation for a fresh-context review of diff, touched files, and test/lint output. Reports by severity; does not edit unless asked.

review.description: Run a fresh-context code review using the shared review contract
review.template:
Review the current changes using the contract in prompts/code-review.md.

Use this evidence:
- Diff: !`git diff --stat`
- Full diff: !`git diff`
- Lint/test: run or paste any relevant lint and test output.

If a handoff was provided (goal, files changed, key decisions, checks run), use it as context. Report findings in the required format: Critical issues, Medium issues, Missing tests, Optional cleanup, Verdict (accept | revise). Do not edit files unless explicitly asked.
